SELECT Album.title, SUM(Track.duration) FROM Track, Album WHERE Track.album_id = Album.album_id GROUP BY Album.title;
SELECT A.title, SUM(T.duration) AS total  FROM Track T, Album A  WHERE T.album_id=A.album_id  GROUP BY A.title;
SELECT Album.title, SUM(Track.duration) FROM Album, Track WHERE Track.album_id = Album.album_id GROUP BY Album.album_id;
SELECT A.title, SUM(T.duration) AS total FROM Track T, Album A WHERE A.album_id = T.album_id GROUP BY A.title HAVING SUM(T.duration);
SELECT A.title, SUM(T.duration) AS duration FROM Track T, Album A WHERE T.album_id=A.album_id GROUP BY album_id;
SELECT title, SUM(duration)  FROM Track, Album  WHERE Track.album_id = Album.album_id  GROUP BY title;
SELECT Album.title, SUM(Track.duration) FROM Album, Track WHERE Album.album_id = Track.album_id GROUP BY Album.title;
